cases.task: Create a minimal Python module from scratch. Write math_utils.py with an add_one(value) function that returns value + 1. Write test_math_utils.py with unittest coverage for positive and negative inputs. Run python -m unittest discover, then finish only after tests pass.
cases.verifier: python -c "from pathlib import Path; import math_utils; assert math_utils.add_one(41) == 42; assert Path('math_utils.py').exists(); assert Path('test_math_utils.py').exists()"
